rationale: Educ. Code §1.002 mandates equal educational services and opportunities. A homestead exemption increase affects district revenue but does not conflict with the equal-access obligation; districts must still provide equal services.
quote: An educational institution undertaking to provide education, services, or activities to any individual within the jurisdiction or geographical boundaries of the educational institution shall provide equal opportunities to all individuals within its jurisdiction or geographical boundaries pursuant to this code.
_note: No direct conflict. Revenue impact on school districts is indirect and does not implicate the equal-services mandate of this statute.
